fragility_points: Full April 13-19 Binance 1-minute coverage was not exhaustively audited in this run.
Short-horizon crypto volatility can change the probability quickly.
The estimate depends heavily on exchange-specific wick behavior.
key_assumptions: A Binance-specific 1-minute wick to 90 is materially easier than a close-above-90 outcome.
SOL trading in the high-80s leaves a real but not overwhelming chance of touching 90 before April 19 ends.
No major crypto risk-off move interrupts the setup.
main_logical_chain: Start from the market's 0.74 prior and ask what it is assuming.
Interpret the contract: any Binance SOL/USDT 1-minute high >=90 settles Yes, which favors wick probability over close-based intuition.
Check direct Binance data: recent sampled highs reached 89.15 but not 90.
Use contextual price/resistance data to confirm 90 is near but not trivial.
Conclude Yes is still more likely than No, but less likely than the market price implies.
main_thesis: The market is correctly pricing the easier touch-market structure, but 0.74 looks somewhat rich versus direct Binance evidence that recent highs remain below 90.
quote_anchors: This market will immediately resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1-minute candle for SOL/USDT ... has a final "High" price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title.
The current price of Solana (SOL) is 87.55 USD
source_quality_view: Rule clarity is high because Polymarket explicitly names Binance SOL/USDT 1-minute highs as the source of truth; verification completeness is moderate because the Binance pass was sampled recent-window data rather than a full interval audit.
strongest_disconfirmers: The verified Binance sample still remained below 90, so the event is not already effectively done.
Nearby resistance around 88-89 means the final move still requires follow-through, not just drift.
strongest_supports: Polymarket resolves on Binance SOL/USDT 1-minute highs, which lowers the bar for Yes.
Direct Binance verification found a sampled recent high of 89.15, showing the threshold is close.
TradingView context put SOL around 87.55 with upside targets above 90 if 88 is cleared.
timing_relevance: Highly timing-sensitive: the remaining days and any fast intraday wick on Binance can decide the market immediately.
unresolved_ambiguities: Whether a full-window Binance audit would reveal stronger prior approach behavior to 90.
How much latent wick probability the market is embedding beyond visible spot references.
what_would_change_view: A full Binance 1-minute interval check, repeated failures below 89, or a decisive risk-on/risk-off move in the broader crypto tape would materially change the estimate.
